reviewBoundary: This registry is not an Askuno app manifest. It defines reusable lifecycle evidence primitives used by WEAVE validation, docs, and runtime review surfaces.

primitives.name: Intent Contract
primitives.customerUse: Names the target user, app intent, authority boundary, and truthful proof standard.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Can later initialize a terminal skill or hosted operator session.

primitives.name: Research Brief
primitives.customerUse: Records demand, infrastructure, pricing, competitors, and risks before selection.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Can later pull approved sources and runtime telemetry into the brief.

primitives.name: Selection Record
primitives.customerUse: Explains why one application wedge is selected and what alternatives are deferred.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Can later feed owner review and public reporting.

primitives.name: Execution Plan
primitives.customerUse: Turns the selected wedge into bounded engineering, QA, KPI setup, marketing, and review tasks.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Can later dispatch task packets to approved execution lanes.

primitives.name: Engineering Evidence
primitives.customerUse: Links implementation work, changed files, command output, and claim limits.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Can later attach pull requests, deployment logs, or workload outputs.

primitives.name: QA Result
primitives.customerUse: Records tests, live checks, failure cases, and readiness judgment.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Can later attach browser checks, API checks, and payment-path checks.

primitives.name: KPI Setup
primitives.customerUse: Defines public and private metrics before marketing starts.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Can later bind aggregate app metrics to public reporting.

primitives.name: Marketing Plan
primitives.customerUse: Prepares audience, channel, message angle, KPI capture path, and approval state.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Can later create approved ads, posts, or distribution tasks.

primitives.name: Iteration Record
primitives.customerUse: Records what changed because of QA, KPI, marketing, feedback, or payment evidence.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Can later restart the lifecycle from new evidence.
